title: scrophularia atroglandulosa
intro: Scrophularia atroglandulosa, also known as the Black-eyed Figwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its high concentration of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Scrophularia atroglandulosa have been associated with various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory infections, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. Scrophularia atroglandulosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to promote health and well-being.
